title: Out Of The Depths

sections.label: Intro
lines: Out of the depths, my soul has climbed,
Through shadows carved by pain and time.
The scars of old, they still remain,
Yet through it all, I call His name.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Long they have pressed upon my frame,
But never crushed, I stand the same.
The furrows deep upon my land,
But here I rise, in grace I stand.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The night was long, the stars grew faint,
But whispers called, “Do not forsake.”
Through every storm, through fire untamed,
A light endures, a love proclaimed.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Though the plow may scar the field,
The earth will bloom, the wounds will heal.
A cry of life from broken ground,
In every trial, His grace resounds.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They tried to bind with ropes of hate,
But mercy’s blade can cut the weight.
Though towers fall and oceans roar,
Faith stands taller, ever more.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Frost gives way to golden light,
In the dawn, the soul takes flight.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Though the plow may scar the field,
The earth will bloom, the wounds will heal.
A cry of life from broken ground,
In every trial, His grace resounds.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Out of the depths, the song remains,
Through every loss, eternal gain.
The stars return, the sky made whole,
A melody etched within the soul.

styleNote: Whispers Of Distant Winds · Triumphant And Uplifting · Repeated With Added Harmonies
